scope_decision: +Medium (F1-F9 approved); F10-F13 backlog (Low / drywall-class). No explicit scope was picked; owner emphasized evidence discipline, so approved=true is set ONLY where both copies were personally read AND callers/blast-radius shown.
global_rules: Refactor by wave, low risk -> high. Run gates after EACH wave: npm run check (0/0), npm test, cargo test (lib.rs mod tests), .\build_all.ps1.
Roll back the wave on any regression. approved=false items are NOT touched.
All consolidations are internal (move shared code into a project module); no new deps, no web check needed except F9's anthropic-version constant (leave untouched).

waves.title: Internal / doc-only — no user-visible behavior change (safest)

items.fix_approach: OWNER DECISION = DEPRECATED+keep. Add header comment '# DEPRECATED — not invoked by the app; native impl in src-tauri/src/lib.rs (<fn>). Kept for reference.' to each of the 7 scripts; add a note to docs/ARCHITECTURE.md. Do NOT delete. Keep the agenthub-local sentinel reference in CLAUDE.md (Manage-Provider.ps1) — it stays valid as a reference doc.
items.blast_radius: zero in-app (grep _SCRIPT_REL: none of the 7 spawned; all lib.rs refs are /// comments). Refs only in CLAUDE.md/docs/README.
items.verify: .\build_all.ps1 still green; Providers/Router/Engine/OpenCode tabs work via native path (no script invoked).

items.fix_approach: Extract fn with_provider_auth(req, protocol: &str, key: &str) -> Request applying x-api-key+anthropic-version (anthropic) else Bearer (openai), skipping empty key. Call from probe_provider and balance_get. Leave anthropic-version: 2023-06-01 literal as-is.
items.verify: cargo test; provider probe + balance authenticate for anthropic and openai.

items.fix_approach: Extract load_installed_plugins() -> Option<(String plugins_dir, Value installed, Value markets)> and first_install_path(arr: &Value) -> &str. Rewrite the 4 prologues to use them. list_plugin_updates reads 'version' instead of installPath at the per-entry step — keep that per-fn.
items.verify: cargo test; Plugins tab descriptions/skills/updates/contents identical to before.

items.fix_approach: find_provider(list: &[Value], id: &str) -> Option<&Value> (for .find sites) and find_provider_mut(list: &mut Vec<Value>, id: &str) -> Option<usize> (for .position sites). Replace the 8 inline predicates; keep each call-site's not-found handling (ok_or vs {ok:false} JSON vs tolerant None).
items.blast_radius: internal; 8 call sites all in the my-providers block.

items.fix_approach: Add formatAbsTime(ts, {snapshotFallback?}) to relativeTime.ts using the Number.isNaN(d.getTime()) guard. Replace the 3 buggy try/catch copies + BackupTab.fmtAbs (pass snapToReadable as snapshotFallback). Empty-return canon = t('common.dash').
items.blast_radius: each fn local to its component markup; no tests on these fns -> add a mini-test for invalid input -> dash.
items.verify: npm run check (0/0); feed '2026-06-08_030000' to each of 4 sites -> dash, never 'Invalid Date'.

items.fix_approach: Import copyText into ForkRepoCard (drop the name-colliding local), Console, TerminalPane.copySelection; set 'copied' from the bool return. Add pasteText() to clipboard.ts for TerminalPane.paste (read-side) or leave paste inline (distinct read semantic).
items.blast_radius: callers flash 'copied' on bool; ForkRepoCard local name removed.
items.verify: npm run check; copy buttons in forks/console/terminal still flash.

items.fix_approach: Move countOf/durationText to a shared module; import in ComponentCard + UpdatesTab. OPEN QUESTION (needs_confirmation): the sub-minute i18n key differs (outcome.ts page.out_sec/out_duration vs ComponentCard updates.durationSeconds) — confirm which wins, or parameterize the key so each surface keeps its label.
items.blast_radius: outcome.ts clean module; ComponentCard health/duration + toasts depend on identical output. i18n key choice may change one label.
items.verify: npm test (outcome.test.ts) + visual: ComponentCard health badge + duration unchanged.

items.fix_approach: Replace both fmtAgo with relTime(ts) at ProfilesTab:350 / SyncTab:166. Keep common.justNow/minutesAgo/hoursAgo/daysAgo keys (HomeTab.ageStr uses them). HomeTab.ageStr: leave as-is (distinct contract: input is hours) — mark with a ponytail comment.
items.blast_radius: exactly 2 call sites (markup). Rendering changes from custom-key form to Intl.RelativeTimeFormat (numeric:'auto' — e.g. 'yesterday'). Visible but an improvement.
items.verify: npm test (parity intact, keys retained); eyeball Profiles + Sync 'checked N ago' labels.

items.fix_approach: OWNER DECISION = strict http(s) everywhere. Extract isValidHttpUrl(s) (requires u.protocol http/https); call from both dialogs' canSubmit + the inline error.
items.blast_radius: ProviderEditDialog.canSubmit becomes stricter (rejects ftp:/mailto: baseUrls). Backend valid_base_url (lib.rs:2661, called at connect_my_provider:3174) already gates — so this is a UX/consistency tightening, not a new security boundary.
items.verify: npm run check; ProviderEditDialog rejects a non-http(s) baseUrl in the submit gate.

backlog_not_approved.note: expand_placeholders == expand_manifest — byte-identical. 2-min win (delete expand_manifest, repoint calls) but Low; fold into a backend cleanup pass.
factored-once-inlined-N: agent_with_timeout(secs) is trivial (5 inlines); action-dispatcher epilogue extraction is low-ROI (arg tables legitimately differ). Do (a), skip (b).
trivial copy-paste one-liners (locale-tag x7, basename x3, json_str x7, color maps, via-label). drywall-class. Best done alongside F2/F3 in relativeTime.ts/format.ts.

structural patterns: write_config_with_backup + load_engines helpers (backend, medium); CollapsibleSection/SegmentedToggle atoms (UI, medium-large, many call sites). Bigger refactor — schedule separately.
